Author: Noranda
Name: XIV Shinies Sync
Punchline: Sync your in-game collection progress to XIV Shinies automatically.
Description: Syncs your in-game collection progress — completed quests, achievements, mounts, minions, and relic items — to your account at https://xiv-shinies.com, so you stop hand-marking. Fully opt-in and per-category. Use /shinies to configure.
